Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day in Dept. 218.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack CSR: Rhonda Fung CSR #4819
Appearances:
Joseph Sacramento, Esq., for and with Plaintiff Gordon Jong.
Victoria L. Young, Defendant in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement for Judgment pursuant to Stipulation,
signed by the parties, but not read into the record.

The Court deemed the matter settled and the DEC-15-2003 trial date is vacated.
